response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, his expertise leans heavily toward JavaScript/TypeScript, web/mobile development, and D language rather than C++. His lack of recent C++ experience, no mention of STL, multi-threading, or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), and no clear evidence of high-performance or scalable C++ systems design make him a misfit for this role. His background in automation or industrial machinery is also absent.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and software craftsmanship mindset (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming)
Experience with high-performance systems (low-latency apps, async I/O, caching)
Proven ability to mentor teams and contribute to open-source projects
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience; primary focus on JS/TS and D language
No evidence of industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) or SDL practices
Lacks experience with STL, multi-threading, or message-broker architectures required for this role
